title: Assistant Driver/ Delivery Support
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Assist the driver in the delivery of food processing products
  • Load, unload and move goods safely while adhering to hygiene standards
  • Ensure cleanliness and food hygiene are maintained during transportation
  • Load, arrange and stack goods onto trolleys in accordance with safety and operational procedures.
  • Verify delivery items against delivery orders and documentation
  • Support basic packing, preparation, or warehouse duties when required
  • Follow workplace safety guidelines and food handling procedures
  • Complete delivery documentation, logs and reports accurately
  • Comply with food safety requirements and company standard operating procedures (SOPs)

Work Hours: Monday to Saturday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Additional hours may be required based on operational needs

Requirements

  • Physically fit and able to perform manual handling tasks such as loading and unloading
  • Able to perform the physical duties of the role, including reaching and stacking items at designated heights and handling goods safely in accordance with workplace safety requirements
  • Able to understand job instructions, safety procedures, basic documentation and daily communication in English
  • Demonstrates a positive work attitude and ability to work well as part of a team
  • Prior experience in food delivery, food manufacturing, food processing, or FMCG industry is preferred

postedCompany.description:
VFI Food Pte Ltd specialises in halal production and export. Committed to delivering high-quality, innovative food solutions to global markets. As a FSSC 22000-certified company, we adhere to the highest international food safety standards, ensuring that our products meet the stringent requirements of both local and overseas markets.

With a strong manufacturing foundation and export expertise, we provide a wide range of customized food solutions, including soups, sauces, stocks, pastes, and ready-to-eat products, catering to airlines, foodservice providers, and retail brands worldwide. Our dedicated R&D team works closely with clients to develop tailor-made recipes and specialty food items, ensuring quality, consistency, and scalability in production.

Beyond food production, VFI Food Pte Ltd also leads special projects, collaborating with industry partners to innovate new food concepts, optimize manufacturing processes, and enhance sustainability efforts. By leveraging cutting-edge technology and strategic partnerships, we are positioned as a trusted partner for businesses looking to expand their global food supply chain with safe, high-quality, and customized food solutions.

At VFI Food Pte Ltd, we don’t just produce food – we create a culinary excellence experience for our customers.
postedCompany.name: VFI FOOD PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
